content.en:
Emperor Fengyang is crazy, he has lost the demeanor of an emperor at all, but like an evil demon who has fallen into the devil.

However, as fast as he rushed, he was sent flying!

I saw that Ye Xingchen held the Xingchen Blade and slashed at the body of the Fengyang Emperor, directly piercing the Fengyang Emperor, and then slapped the Fengyang Emperor out with one palm.

Emperor Fengyang is flowing with the blood of the emperor, and the blood is spilled into the void, looking as embarrassed as he is.

"Emperor!"

One Dao Ancestor after another rushed over.

Several of them protected the Emperor of Fengyang, for fear that the Emperor of Fengyang would fall and die.

"Get out of the way, I can fight again!"

Emperor Fengyang roared angrily.

However, those Dao Ancestors didn't let the Fengyang Emperor fight again, otherwise the Fengyang Emperor fell, or if the mentality exploded again, and the Dao Heart collapsed, they would not be able to escape the blame.

As a result, a famous Taoist ancestor performed a Taoist technique to calm the mind to calm down the Fengyang Emperor.

After a while, Emperor Fengyang calmed down a little, but his eyes were still full of anger.

"Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, kill Ye Xingchen for me!"

Emperor Fengyang said.

"This ......" Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor showed a look of embarrassment.

"What, can't it?" Emperor Fengyang said in a deep voice: "We are the Heavenly Emperor Palace, what are the mere human races? I want to kill an invincible true ancestor of the human race, am I not qualified? As for the consequences, I will bear them all!"

"He is the son of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor!"

Lei Yun Dao Ancestor hurriedly said.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, it's just a Dao Ancestor who has just broken through, and now it's only at the realm of the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor at most!"

Lei Yun Dao Ancestor really wanted to scold the Fengyang Emperor for being an idiot, Wan Fa Dao Ancestor was something he could offend?

He is a Dao Ancestor who has been promoted by the Supreme True Ancestor, and the worst achievement in the future is also the Invincible Dao Ancestor, let him kill Ye Xingchen, will the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor Ye Tian let him go?

"Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, I order you to kill Ye Xingchen as the emperor!"

Emperor Fengyang ordered.

"Yes!"

Thundercloud Dao Ancestor answered.

He didn't dare to disobey it anymore, the rules of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were very strict, if he disobeyed the emperor's orders at will, even if the Fengyang Emperor was deprived of the emperor's identity, but a Dao ancestor like him would be severely punished by the Heavenly Emperor Palace or even kill chickens and monkeys, this is the rule of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

If everyone doesn't follow the rules, how will the Heavenly Imperial Palace be managed and how will it deter the Quartet?

Even if the command is wrong, cruel, or endangering one's own life, do it.

Rumble!

The Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor made a move, using the strength of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors to suppress Ye Xingchen.

Not far away.

Ye Xingchen felt an irresistible force, his strength was at most comparable to the top Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but far from being able to compete with the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

The Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor could blow him up with a single blow, and the two were not at the same level.

Click!

The void where Ye Xingchen was located seemed to be squeezed by a terrifying force, making it almost impossible for him to move.

I saw the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor coming step by step, and the momentum of the Five Heavenly Dao Ancestors locked on Ye Xingchen, making him unable to escape.

"Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, don't waste time!"

Emperor Fengyang urged.

Lei Yun Dao Ancestor sighed: "Ye Xingchen, it's a pity that you are from the human race, you don't have a big background, don't blame me!"

As he spoke, he condensed a thunder spear in his hand and stabbed at Ye Xingchen.

Perhaps it was the life and death crisis that Ye Xingchen had an epiphany, and Xingchen Daoyi actually broke through, and suddenly stepped into the Dacheng realm from the peak realm of Xiaocheng.

The Star Dao Clothes of the Dacheng Realm appeared, trying to resist the Thunder Spear of the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor.

"You are really very rebellious, and you actually cultivated the Zhongqian Dao Technique Star Dao Yi to the Dacheng Realm in the Invincible True Ancestor Realm, but unfortunately you still can't block this blow!"

Lei Yun Dao Ancestor regretted.

The thunder spear instantly pierced the Xingchen Dao coat of the Dacheng realm and continued to stab at Ye Xingchen.

This is still, Ye Xingchen's life-saving defense was activated one by one, but it was still pierced layer by layer, until Ye Xingchen's body was pierced.

I thought that Ye Xingchen would be killed with one blow, but at this time, a large amount of origin power appeared in Ye Xingchen's body, and he quickly repaired his injuries.

At this moment, Thundercloud Dao Ancestor was stunned.

Taking advantage of this opportunity, Ye Xingchen left quickly, slightly opening up a distance.

I saw that Ye Xingchen's wound had healed quickly, and the rules of thunder belonging to the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor had also been dispelled.

At this time, his aura was getting stronger and stronger, and he had already broken the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, and was transforming towards another realm.

"You have given birth to the Supreme Dao Source!"

Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor reacted and said incredulously.

Not far away, Emperor Fengyang's pupils shrank sharply, and he couldn't believe it.

Supreme True Ancestor, what he has always been aiming for!

He wanted to challenge a large number of Invincible True Ancestors, trying to find that one in a hundred million luck in order to break the shackles and be promoted to the Supreme True Ancestor.

But he knew that he had little hope.

However, Ye Xingchen actually broke the shackles in front of him and was promoted to the Supreme True Ancestor.

"Kill him, quick, kill him!"

Emperor Fengyang shouted.

Lei Yun Dao Ancestor gritted his teeth and shot again.

This time, he wasn't ready to keep his hand.

It was just a casual blow from his hand just now, and he didn't use any strength at all, otherwise he wouldn't have killed an invincible true ancestor.

Even if Ye Xingchen broke through to the Supreme True Ancestor, it would be useless, and he was still far from being able to compete with him.

"Heavenly Thunder Spear!"

This is the Thousand Dao Technique of Thundercloud Dao Ancestor's fame, and its power is very terrifying, far from being comparable to the ordinary Thunder Spear that was condensed by the power of Dao Ancestor just now.

Burst!

The Heavenly Thunder Spear penetrated in an instant, not to mention that Ye Xingchen was only in the transformation of the Supreme True Ancestor, even if he was in the combat power of the True Supreme True Ancestor, he would be killed in an instant.

"Unstoppable!"

Ye Xingchen said in despair.

The excitement of breaking through to the Supreme True Ancestor was gone, and he could only smile bitterly and close his eyes.

Just then, a familiar voice came.

"A fivefold Heavenly Dao ancestor whose potential has been exhausted would dare to kill my son?"

As soon as the words fell, a figure tore through the void, holding the Heavenly Thunder Spear with one hand, and then pinched it gently, and the Heavenly Thunder Spear shattered instantly.

Then, this person seemed to have come to the front of the Thundercloud Dao Ancestor in an instant, and the right hand containing the forbidden power suddenly pinched the neck of the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor.

At the same time, a bondage-type Great Thousand Dao Technique suppressed Thundercloud Dao Ancestor, making it difficult for him to move.

"You're going to kill my son?"

The man asked.

Only then did the Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor see the appearance of the person who came, and it was the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, it's you!"

Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor was terrified.

He never expected that the Wanfa Dao Ancestor would be so powerful, and he would be like an ant in front of the Wanfa Dao Ancestor.

After the Supreme True Ancestor became a Dao Ancestor, was it so powerful?
